dataset.description: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).

columns.description: Unique identifier for batter players, with full player names
columns.name: player_name

columns.description: Fixed role designation ('Batter') for all entries
columns.name: role

columns.description: Lifetime runs scored by the batter across all matches
columns.name: total_runs

columns.description: Batting strike rate calculated as (total_runs / total_balls_faced) * 100
columns.name: strike_rate

columns.description: Total balls faced by the batter in their career
columns.name: total_balls_faced

columns.description: Total wickets taken when occasionally bowling (secondary skill)
columns.name: total_wickets_taken

columns.description: Runs conceded when bowling (non-primary role)
columns.name: total_runs_conceded

columns.description: Total overs bowled (limited for primary batters)
columns.name: total_overs_bowled

columns.description: Career total matches participated in
columns.name: total_matches_played

columns.description: Matches where player was primarily a batter (matches total_matches_played)
columns.name: matches_played_as_batter

columns.description: Zero value confirms this table tracks primary batters
columns.name: matches_played_as_bowler

columns.description: Number of matches won by the player's team
columns.name: matches_won

columns.description: Number of matches lost by the player's team
columns.name: matches_lost

columns.description: Count of Man of the Match honors received
columns.name: player_of_match_awards

columns.description: National team represented by the player
columns.name: team

columns.description: Batting average (total_runs / dismissals), though some extreme outliers exist
columns.name: average

columns.description: Unique identifier for bowling specialists
columns.name: player_name

columns.description: Fixed role designation ('Bowler') for all entries
columns.name: role

columns.description: Career runs scored when batting (secondary skill)
columns.name: total_runs

columns.description: Bowling strike rate (balls bowled per wicket taken)
columns.name: strike_rate

columns.description: Balls faced while batting (non-primary role)
columns.name: total_balls_faced

columns.description: Career wickets taken as a primary bowler
columns.name: total_wickets_taken

columns.description: Runs conceded across all bowling spells
columns.name: total_runs_conceded

columns.description: Total overs delivered in their career
columns.name: total_overs_bowled

columns.description: Total matches participated in
columns.name: total_matches_played

columns.description: Zero value confirms focus on bowling role
columns.name: matches_played_as_batter

columns.description: Matches where player bowled (mirrors total_matches_played)
columns.name: matches_played_as_bowler

columns.description: Team wins while the bowler participated
columns.name: matches_won

columns.description: Team losses while the bowler participated
columns.name: matches_lost

columns.description: Man of the Match awards received
columns.name: player_of_match_awards

columns.description: National team represented
columns.name: team

columns.description: Runs conceded per over bowled
columns.name: economy_rate

columns.description: Bowling average (runs conceded per wicket taken)
columns.name: average

columns.description: Unique identifier for individual matches
columns.name: match_id

columns.description: Player name with performance details for a specific match
columns.name: player

columns.description: Team the player represented in the match
columns.name: team

columns.description: Runs scored by the player in the match
columns.name: runs

columns.description: Balls faced while batting
columns.name: balls_faced

columns.description: Number of 4-run boundaries hit
columns.name: fours

columns.description: Number of 6-run boundaries hit
columns.name: sixes

columns.description: Wickets taken by the player if they bowled
columns.name: wickets

columns.description: Overs delivered (as integer counts)
columns.name: overs_bowled

columns.description: Total balls bowled (overs * 6)
columns.name: balls_bowled

columns.description: Runs given up while bowling
columns.name: runs_conceded

columns.description: Fielding catches taken
columns.name: catches

columns.description: Run-outs effected by the player
columns.name: run_outs

columns.description: Maiden overs bowled (overs with no runs conceded)
columns.name: maiden

columns.description: Stumpings made (for wicket-keepers)
columns.name: stumps

columns.description: Result (win/loss) for the player's team
columns.name: match_outcome

columns.description: Opponent team in the match
columns.name: opposition_team

columns.description: Batting strike rate for the match
columns.name: strike_rate

columns.description: Bowling economy rate (runs per over)
columns.name: economy

columns.description: Composite metric aggregating batting, bowling, and fielding contributions
columns.name: fantasy_points

columns.description: Stadium/location where the match was played
columns.name: venue

columns.description: Unique identifier linking to detailed_player_data
columns.name: match_id

columns.description: Date when the match record was created
columns.name: created

columns.description: Host city for the match
columns.name: city

columns.description: Date(s) when the match occurred
columns.name: dates

columns.description: Tournament or series name (e.g., ICC World Cup)
columns.name: event_name

samples: ICC Men's Cricket World Cup League 2
stats.top: ICC Men's Cricket World Cup League 2

columns.description: Sequence identifier in a tournament/series
columns.name: match_number

columns.description: Fixed value 'male' indicating men's matches
columns.name: gender

columns.description: Format (ODI - One Day International)
columns.name: match_type

columns.description: Sequential identifier for ODI matches
columns.name: match_type_number

columns.description: Team that won the pre-match coin toss

columns.description: Toss winner's choice to 'bat' or 'field'
columns.name: toss_decision

columns.description: Winning team of the match
columns.name: outcome_winner

columns.description: Margin of victory in runs (if batting second)
columns.name: outcome_by_runs

columns.description: Margin of victory in remaining wickets (if chasing)
columns.name: outcome_by_wickets

columns.description: Fixed 50-over format indicator
columns.name: overs

columns.description: Outstanding performer awarded Man of the Match
columns.name: player_of_match

columns.description: Cricket season/year the match occurred in
columns.name: season

columns.description: Comma-separated list of competing teams
columns.name: teams

columns.description: Stadium name and location
columns.name: venue

columns.description: Total 4-run boundaries hit by both teams
columns.name: total_fours

columns.description: Total 6-run boundaries hit by both teams
columns.name: total_sixes

desc: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).
goal: Analyze the consistency of individual player performances, focusing on how batters and bowlers vary in their runs, balls faced, wickets taken, and other statistics across different matches.
name: Visual Analytics System cricket_goal1_1742656009

plan.path: The user starts with View 1 (Overview) comparing consistency scores across teams and roles. Team/role selections filter View 2's trend analysis and View 4's distribution analysis. Clicking players in View 2 reveals extremes in View 3 (Detail). Range selections in View 4's violin plots update View 5's spatial performance clusters (Insight).

effect.description: Filters subsequent views to selected team(s) and role(s)

visualization.description: Horizontal grouped bar chart comparing batters and bowlers' consistency scores colored by team, with error bands showing ±1 STD
encodings: x: consistency score (calculated using D4 formulas)

effect.description: Highlights matching player in subsequent views

visualization.description: Synchronized dual-axis line chart showing performance trends with team-based highlighting
Annotated scatter plot showing extreme performances with dynamic threshold sliders
encodings: y: performance delta from career average

effect.description: Filters performance ranges in spatial view

visualization.description: Violin plots with nested box plots showing distribution spreads per team
Hexbin heatmap overlay on world map showing spatial performance clusters

data.reason: Original player_name-team key risks collisions for players with same name on same team. Adding role ensures proper separation between batter/bowler records
data.requirement: Link batter/bowler career stats with match performances using player_name + team + role as composite key

data.reason: Detailed_player_data already contains venue field, avoiding unnecessary join complexity. Session timing analysis not feasible without time data in tables
data.requirement: Calculate venue-based performance clusters using detailed_player_data.venue directly instead of match_summary

data.reason: Original formula mixed incompatible metrics across roles. New formulas use role-appropriate metrics while maintaining comparability within roles
data.requirement: Derive role-specific consistency scores: Batters - (mean_runs * strike_rate)/std_runs, Bowlers - (mean_wickets * (1/economy))/std_wickets

interaction.reason: Original cross-role brushing wasn't meaningful as players are exclusively batters or bowlers in source tables
interaction.requirement: Role-filtered attribute brushing between career stats and match performance metrics

visualization.reason: Small multiples impractical with 2k+ players. Rolling averages better show recent consistency trends with scalable implementation
visualization.requirement: Faceted line charts showing rolling average of runs (batters) and economy (bowlers) over last 10 matches

visualization.reason: Horizontal stacking of different metrics caused misleading comparisons. Separated views maintain clear role-specific analysis
visualization.requirement: Separate box plots for batter runs and bowler strike rates with team-based color encoding

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_batter_stats AS SELECT player_name, total_runs, strike_rate, team, matches_played_as_batter, total_wickets_taken FROM batter_player_stats;
sqls.name: vw_batter_stats

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_bowler_stats AS SELECT player_name, total_wickets_taken, economy_rate, team, matches_played_as_bowler, total_runs FROM bowler_player_stats;
sqls.name: vw_bowler_stats

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_detailed_player_data AS SELECT match_id, player, team, runs, balls_faced, fours, sixes, wickets, overs_bowled, balls_bowled, runs_conceded, catches, run_outs, maiden, stumps, match_outcome, opposition_team, strike_rate, economy, fantasy_points, venue FROM detailed_player_data;
sqls.name: vw_detailed_player_data

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_match_summary AS SELECT match_id, dates, venue, city, gender, match_type, total_wickets_taken, total_runs, total_fours, total_sixes FROM match_summary;
sqls.name: vw_match_summary

tasks.method: Use D4 role-specific formulas to calculate consistency scores. Visualize with horizontal grouped bar charts (batters vs bowlers) colored by team, sorted by score magnitude. Include statistical bands showing ±1 STD from mean consistency.
tasks.objective: Quantify performance consistency across roles using standardized metrics for direct comparison within role groups

tasks.method: Implement V1 requirement with synchronized line charts: X=sequential matches (ordered by date), Y1=rolling 10-match batting runs average, Y2=rolling 10-match bowling economy. Enable team-based highlighting and outlier annotation.
tasks.objective: Identify performance trend patterns and short-term consistency variations across match sequences

tasks.method: Apply D3 requirement using hexbin heatmaps overlay on world map: X/Y=geo-coordinates of venues (derived from venue names), color intensity=cluster density of runs+wickets performance metrics. Enable cluster boundary toggles.
tasks.objective: Discover spatial patterns in player performance consistency across global venues

tasks.method: Enable I3 brushing between parallel coordinates (career stats) and scatter plot matrix (match metrics). Brushing propagates selections via D2 composite key across views using role-filtered data channels.
tasks.objective: Reveal cross-domain relationships between career achievements and match-level performance variability

tasks.method: Dynamic histogram sliders for runs+wickets thresholds. Display extremes as annotated points on scatter plot with size=performance delta from career average. Contextual encoding uses D2 keys via tooltip linking.
tasks.objective: Detect exceptionally high/low performances relative to individual baselines across match conditions

tasks.method: V2-compliant violin plots with nested box plots, split by team. Use quantile-based gradient fills (0-25-75-100%) with interactive range slider for metric filtering.
tasks.objective: Compare value distribution spread across teams to identify consistency outliers and typical performance bands
